title: Combination of toYYYYMM(date) partitioning and toWeek(date, 3) filtering returns incorrect results
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/c3175e2a-85df-4259-af38-35b485959e02
`toWeek(date, 3)` function returns empty results when filtering on valid week numbers.
The same dataset filtered using `toISOWeek(date) / toWeekOfYear(date, 3)` returns rows as expected.
This incorrect behavior only affects the last month of year partition (`202512`), which includes weeks `49, 50, 51, 52`
Filtering weeks in other partitions works correctly
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Found in version v24.3.4.147-lts
Reproduced in 25.11.1.3506
```
CREATE TABLE test_table
(
`date` Date,
`value` String
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(date)
ORDER BY date;
INSERT INTO test_table
SELECT
'2026-01-01'::date - toIntervalDay(number % 365) AS date,
randomPrintableASCII(10, number) AS value
FROM numbers(10000);
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE toWeek(date, 3) = 48;
-- returns 196
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE toWeek(date, 3) = 49;
-- returns 0
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE toWeek(date) = 49;
-- returns 196
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE toISOWeek(date) = 49;
-- returns 196
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_v2 (id INTEGER, date DATE, value VARCHAR, category VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO test_table_v2 SELECT number, DATE '2026-01-01' - INTERVAL (number % 365) DAY AS date, random_string(10) AS value, CASE WHEN number % 2 = 0 THEN 'A' ELSE NULL END AS category FROM range(10000);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_v2 WHERE EXTRACT(WEEK FROM date) = 52 AND category IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_v2 WHERE EXTRACT(WEEK FROM date) = 49 OR EXTRACT(ISOWEEK FROM date) = 49;
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM test_table_v2 WHERE date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND date < DATE '2026-01-08';
key_bug_features: toYYYYMM partitioning with toWeek filtering returns incorrect results
